case_title: HUICI, BRIGIDA OWNER & DBA BAOBAD FLORES & GIFTS VS FRAIGE, RICHARD OWNER DBA HAYES VALLEY PROPERTIES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HUICI, BRIGIDA OWNER & DBA BAOBAD FLORES & GIFTS AS TO DEFENDANT FRAIGE, RICHARD OWNER DBA HAYES VALLEY PROPERTIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-10-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUICI, BRIGIDA OWNER & DBA BAOBAD FLORES & GIFTS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FRAIGE, RICHARD OWNER DBA HAYES VALLEY PROPERTIES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
AUTHORIZATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF FOR PICK UP OF EXHIBITS BY VERONICA M.PITBLADDO FILED IN FOLDER.
